gitSafetyRules.description: If changes are ONLY in index.js or rules.json, immediately return PASS. Do not analyze these files. Do not include them in violations.
Evaluate rules strictly in ascending order of id. If any rule with severity HIGH or CRITICAL is violated, immediately return BLOCK without checking remaining rules.
Block commits containing hardcoded credentials or sensitive authentication data.
If sensitive or dependency files are committed without being listed in .gitignore, this is a HIGH violation.
Direct commits to main or master branches are not allowed under any circumstances.
Large binary files must not be committed directly. Git LFS must be used.
If the changes indicate exposed secrets or credentials, treat it as a HIGH risk even if detection is uncertain.
Output MUST be a single valid JSON object matching the schema. No text, no explanation, no markdown. If unsure, verdict MUST be BLOCK.
